summary: Executed backend + mobile-web UI regression for requested oplevering flow on public preview URL. Worker login, admin login, oplevering render checks, no-damage create+send, schade-without-photo rejection, and signed verzenden endpoint all validated.

integration_issues.issue: On web, immediate tap on 'Opslaan & PDF versturen' right after drawing signature can trigger alert 'Plaats eerst de handtekening van de klant'. Retrying with a short delay succeeded and sent PDF.

action_items: Investigate web signature state timing/race so immediate save after signing is always accepted.
Add testID attributes to admin login interactive elements (email input, password input, login button, back button) for stable automation.
Align frontend/backend env usage with playbook fail-fast policy (EXPO_BACKEND_URL pattern, avoid hardcoded fallbacks).
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/app/admin/login.tsx interactive controls are missing testID attributes, reducing reliable mobile-web test automation coverage.
frontend/app/werkbon/oplevering.tsx and auth screens rely on EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL/apiUrl fallbacks; playbook requires strict EXPO_BACKEND_URL-style env consistency.
backend/server.py uses default fallbacks for APP_URL and DB_NAME; deployment guidance prefers env-only fail-fast configuration.

success_rate.frontend: 92% (core requested flows passed; 1 reproducible timing issue on immediate signature save)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned TEST_OpleveringKlant_* and TEST_OpleveringWerf_* records plus temporary oplevering werkbonnen during pytest runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: NO MOCKED API USED. Public preview URL used. Worker login with davy@smart-techbv.be and admin login with hr@smart-techbv.be both succeeded. Oplevering form shows schade toggle labels, 5-star categories, signature section, and optional customer email toggle. Backend create/send flow works and sent mail to info@smart-techbv.be during test.
rca_of_issue: RCA (likely): Signature presence check depends on async state (`hasSignature`) set by canvas end event; if user taps save immediately, validation can run before state settles, producing false 'signature missing'. Mitigation: persist a synchronous signature flag/ref on draw end or force-read signature before validation on web path.
